kirundi.your_equation_click_tile_to_remove: Ingingo yawe (fyonda ikaro kugira ngo ukure)
kirundi.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Fyonda amakaro ari hejuru kugira ngo wubake ingingo...
kirundi.value_to_apply_to_both_sides: Agaciro ko gushira ku mpande zombi
kirundi.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Baza umwigisha AI ikintu cose kuri aljebra!
kirundi.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Umurongo, kareya, gusesengura, sisitemu, korosha. AI igaragaza buri ntambwe + itanga izina ry'imiterere yakoreshejwe (igabanya, guhuza ibice bisa, FOIL). Ibibazo bisanzwe vya AP / SAT / Aljebra 1 vyose bigabanuka kugeza ku mihindagurikire ~8.
kirundi.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Imitwe y'ibibazo y'ubukana butandukanye. AI igenzura igisubizo cawe kandi inyura mu gisubizo cuzuye kugira ngo ubone neza aho intambwe zawe zatandukaniye. Yubaka akamenyero ko kwandika imibare, atari ugukeka gusa.
kirundi.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Toranya impinduka + ibikorwa + agaciro intego; sisitemu ikora ikibazo ca aljebra gihuye n'igishushanyo cawe. Ifite akamaro ku bigisha bakora amapaji y'akazi n'abanyeshure basesengura inyuma "ico gituma ikibazo kigora."
kirundi.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Kurura ibiro ku minzani kugira ngo werekane x + 3 = 7 mu buryo bugaragara. Ubushishozi bw'ingirakamaro cane kuri aljebra yo hambere — ingingo ni iminzani, si imyanya yuzuye yo kuzuza. Ico ukora ku ruhande rumwe, gikore ku rundi.
kirundi.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Baza umwigisha kuri iciyumviro cose ca aljebra canke intambwe yakwamye. Umwigisha azi urwego rw'ishure ryawe, kugerageza vuba aha, n'ikibazo gikora. Ciza cane ku bibazo "kuki uburyo bwanje butakoze?"
